Video.summary: These women play for keeps in the darkest alleys of noir cinema.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From smoldering glances to deadly betrayals, these thrillers show just how far desire can push the human heart.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: When horror wears an alluring face, loyalties blur and desire becomes the deadliest curse of all.
Video.grandparentTitle: Fatale Femmes Vol. 3: Daughters of Darkness
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Giant monsters are on the rampage! Who will save us?
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Duck You Suckers! It's time for more Grindhouse trailer fun from TFH!
Video.title: Revenge of the Grindhouse

Video.summary: Journey back to the 1950s and 60s, where science and imagination brought forth a new wave of classic films.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Monsters, aliens, mutants, and more! Who will save us from cinema's most terrifying atomic-era creatures?
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: It's a wild blast from the past, as atomic monsters, aliens, and more invade your living room!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From the depths of space (and deeper), comes an all-new collection of intergalactic invaders and futuristic fears!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Alien conquerors plot to destroy humanity using mind control and the monster Viras. Can Gamera stop this madness??
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Enter the “36th Chamber of the Shaolin” to a world of fast flying fists of fury!
Video.title: Fists of Legend

Video.summary: ‘Shaft,” and “Foxy Brown” all rolled out to the “Car Wash” with “Sweet Sweetbacks Badasss Song” on the radio!
Video.title: Bad Ass Blaxploitation

Video.summary: Aliens and Androids have taken a “Fantastic Voyage” to Earth, and now we are all in “Altered States!”
Video.title: Aliens, Androids & Alternate Futures Vol. 1

Video.summary: From 'Haunted Hill' to Corman classics, Vincent Price sent shivers down the spines of horror fans for decades.
Video.grandparentTitle: Vincent Price: Master of the Silver Scream
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Bikers, Babes, and Badass ACTION: Revisiting the best of 60s and 70s cult cinema.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Stay off the streets when these Hollywood stars get behind the wheel.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Celebrating the bold storytelling, unforgettable characters, and cultural impact of Black cinema.
Video.grandparentTitle: Rebels, Icons, and Revolution: A Journey Through Black Cinema
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Your favorite filmmakers discuss the action, resilience, and cultural impact of Black cinema throughout the decades.
Video.grandparentTitle: Cinematic Soul: Black Stories in Film
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Shaft to Coffy to Truck Turner and more, celebrating the best action films of the Blaxploitation genre.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From socially charged dramas to alternate realities, these are the films that defined decades of Black culture.
Video.grandparentTitle: Legends of Black Cinema: Stories That Break the System
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Step inside a world of streetwise anti-heroes, rebels, and genre-defining Black filmmakers who did things their own way.
Video.grandparentTitle: Street Kings: Icons, Outlaws, and Originals
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In these sci-fi classics, no one is quite who they seem, and the threat of invasion is closer than you think.
Video.grandparentTitle: Impostor Syndrome: The Best of Big Screen Body Snatchers
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Science fiction dominated cinema screens in the 1980s, and these are the ones we'll always remember.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: TFH creator Joe Dante highlights Hollywood's atomic age paranoia and the nightmares unleashed on unsuspecting audiences.
Video.grandparentTitle: Joe Dante Enters the Atomic Age
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Step into the world of horror and sci-fi master John Carpenter with this spine-tingling look at some of his most celebrated films.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In space, only the people sitting next to you can hear you scream. So scream loud!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Take a journey into the future with this collection of celebrated classic sci-fi action movies.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: TFH creator Joe Dante pays tribute to the classic creature features that inspired a generation of filmmakers.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Leroy Fisk (Richard Lawson) is looking to make money, but his skills are better suited for the streets than the office. This 1975 blaxploitation classic co-stars “Miami Vice” hero Philip Michael Thomas and Emmy winner Dabney Coleman.
Video.title: Black Fist

Video.summary: Six NFL superstars tackle the big screen as a biker gang seeking revenge on the racist thugs who killed one member’s brother.
Video.title: The Black Six

Video.summary: Action legend Fred Williamson directs and stars in this crime drama about a down-on-his-luck veteran who must choose sides when rival Mafia factions go to war in the streets.
Video.title: Mean Johnny Barrows

Video.summary: A black actor’s dream of making a movie becomes a nightmare when he’s forced to borrow money from local gangsters. Calvin Lockhart headlined this 1977 blaxploitation classic on the heels of “Let’s Do It Again” and “Uptown Saturday Night.”
Video.title: The Baron
